metadata.title: HEAVY TRUST HAND ON WESTERN FARMER.

pages.raw_text:
More every day the people of the United States
coming to that the private ownershps of public uti


tiles is obnoxious. But in western states this matter
has taken phase Generally it is the city man
who is ridden down by the trust has been the gas
pany, the street railway and the water company; but in
many parts of the west the farmer is awakening to the
fact that he is about to be laid under tribute The pri
vate corporation has to his valley and laid its hand
the waters up in the canyon Those waters have been
hanessed and made to generate electric power And for
the of that power the residents of the valley
taxed


At present the price may be satisfactory. These
The man who has promoted the power
company resident Of the principal village served
He is regarded benefactor to the community. His
enterprise deserving Of praise; his capital entitled to
extra reward.


But how about the future? How about 10 years from
now? When the promoter is dead or has moved away;
when the corporation has been sold to eastern synd
cate; when its capital stock has been increased and the
service has been permitted to deprecate; when equp
ment is neglected and the rates raisedwhat then


About that time the prominent orchardman in the in
dignation meeting will be asking who gave this corpora
ton perpetual right to the waters up in the canyon.
Someone will want to know where the authorities were
when this concern chartered without any proviso
limiting the rates it might charge. third will ask why
private and alien corporation should levy tax on the
community for the of public thing like the waters
which from the up in the mountain tops.
And the who his citrus grove whitening for lack
of the water which he longer afford to pump at the
increased cost OF power will the mprovldent men OF
generation who let this thing go


In its management of the irrigation works the govern
ment has shown how it should be managed. In all gov
eminent projects the water rights go with the lands and
the DAMS bikes and reservoirs all held and admins
tered in socialistic basis. There is no
landlord and waterford Every man has his acre
and every is proportonate owner of the water.


To let private corporations in and establish
themselves powerlords is crime against the coming
generation Monopoly unrestraned is invariably oppres
son If power cannot be developed by communities and
administered communism then the federal government
or the authorities ought to that there is super
vision for such trusts which will go their rates, capital
ization and practical administration.
